docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YU, CARSON HEARING SET FOR SEP-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CARSON YU IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO SEP-03-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MIKELDI LATORRE MONTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARSON YU IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LATORRE MONTON, MIKELDI COWDERY, CALLARD ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, CARSON $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $123.43 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,323.43, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

CLAIM SET FOR SEP-03-2025 IS VACATED BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS MIKELDI LATORRE MONTON & CALLARD ELIZABETH COWDERY AND AGAINST DEFENDANT CARSON YU IN THE AMOUNT OF $1200.00 AND $123.43 IN COSTS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YU, CARSON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,241.54 FILED BY LATORRE MONTON, MIKELDI COWDERY, CALLARD ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT YU, CARSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-16-2025 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-21-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2025 - CONTINUED DUE TO CLERK'S ERROR - TO JUL-16-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $81.00 SERVED MAY-29-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YU, CARSON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS MIKELDI LATORRE MOLTON AND CALLARD ELIZABETH COWDERY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARSON YU IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LATORRE MONTON, MIKELDI COWDERY, CALLARD ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, CARSON $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $123.43 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,323.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
